com.nexacro.java.xapi.tx

Interface JavaTypeDataSerializer

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    PlatformBinaryJavaTypeDataSerializer, PlatformXmlJavaTypeDataSerializer

    public interface JavaTypeDataSerializer

    transform Variable and DataSet to particular type and output by OutputStream or Writer.

    Author:
    Choi, Jongkwan
    See Also:
    DataSerializer, PartDataSerializer

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void setCharset(java.lang.String charset)
      Set character set(charset).
      void setDataConverter(JavaTypeDataConverter dataConverter)
      Set JavaTypeDataConverter.
      void setOutputStream(java.io.OutputStream out)
      Set OutputStream.
      void setProperty(java.lang.String key, java.lang.Object value)
      Set property value.
      void setWriter(java.io.Writer out)
      Set Writer.
      void writeDataSet(java.lang.String name)
      Transform DataSet to particular type and output withOutputStream or Writer.
      void writeDataSetConstantHeader(java.lang.String name, int dataType, int dataSize, java.lang.Object value)
      Transform DataSet ConstantColumnHeader to particular typeand output with OutputStream or Writer.
      void writeDataSetHeader(java.lang.String name, int dataType, int dataSize)
      Transform DataSet ColumnHeader to particular type and output with OutputStream or Writer.
      void writeDataSetRow(java.lang.Object[] values)
      Transform DataSet row to particular type and output with OutputStream or Writer.
      void writeHead()
      Transform data to data indicating start and output with OutputStream or Writer.
      void writeTail()
      Transform data to data indicating close and output with OutputStream or Writer.
      void writeVariable(java.lang.String name, int dataType, java.lang.Object value)
      Transform Variable to particular type and output with OutputStream or Writer.
